overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic urban downtown at dusk. The scene features massive elevated highways, neon-lit skyscrapers, moderate vehicle traffic with futuristic cars, and scattered pedestrians, with a distinctive cyberpunk atmosphere mixing golden hour sunlight with artificial neon illumination.

events.description: futuristic white sedan with glowing taillights drives past from left to right
character turns slightly right to follow the sidewalk curve around the building corner

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk under the elevated highway, navigating around the street corner

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in orange jacket and white cap walking toward the camera
white sedan driving along the street with headlights illuminated

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel elevated highway structure dominating the upper frame with heavy support beams
green illuminated street sign with white text mounted on the concrete building
gray concrete building facade with horizontal metal railings and industrial piping
tall glass and steel skyscraper with illuminated windows visible in the distance between structures

segments.scene_description: The segment opens under a massive elevated highway overpass in a futuristic urban setting. The character walks along a concrete sidewalk next to a gray industrial building with a green 'Farragut' street sign visible. Pedestrians walk toward the camera while futuristic vehicles pass by on the left, their headlights cutting through the dusk atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with elevated highway overhead

events.description: multiple futuristic vehicles with glowing red taillights stream past on the left side
emerging from deep shadow under the overpass into area with more ambient light

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk parallel to moderate traffic flow, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: stream of futuristic cars with illuminated taillights driving past in the same direction
pedestrian in red top walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: large illuminated digital billboard with pink and red neon advertising visible on distant building
tall industrial pole with traffic signals and attached street lighting

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the sidewalk under the elevated highway, with the concrete building now further to the right. A large neon billboard becomes visible in the distance on the left, while moderate traffic flows past on the street. The lighting shifts as the character moves through varying shadow patterns cast by the overpass structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with crosswalks and traffic signals

events.description: character steps off the sidewalk onto the crosswalk to cross the multi-lane street
character pauses briefly to allow a yellow taxi cab to pass before continuing across

agents.ego_description: crossing the multi-lane street at a crosswalk, navigating between vehicles and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi cab with headlights on slowing down at the intersection
group of pedestrians crossing the street in the same direction toward the far sidewalk

entered.detail: tall palm tree visible on the corner of the intersection, silhouetted against the sky
building facade with bright red neon triangular trim along the roofline

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the sidewalk onto a crosswalk to cross the busy intersection. The scene opens up with more sky visible, revealing palm trees and buildings with bright red neon signage. The character navigates through moderate pedestrian traffic while a yellow taxi passes by, with the elevated highway structure now appearing closer overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk under elevated highway with industrial elements

events.description: character continues straight along the sidewalk passing under the massive highway support columns
passing by scattered debris and papers littering the concrete sidewalk surface

agents.ego_description: walking along the far side sidewalk under the elevated highway, passing support columns and street lights

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue shorts and brown jacket walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: massive steel and concrete support pillar for the elevated highway with industrial detailing
scattered papers and trash littering the concrete sidewalk surface

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the far side of the intersection and continues along the sidewalk under the elevated highway. The scene features industrial support columns, scattered debris on the ground, and palm trees now closer on the right. The traffic has thinned to parked vehicles only, and the character follows a pedestrian ahead through the urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a futuristic urban sidewalk that transitions from the shadow of an industrial overpass toward the glow of distant neon signage. It begins beneath a massive elevated highway, tracking a character walking past a gray industrial building marked by a green Farragut street sign. As the character advances, pedestrians move toward the camera and futuristic vehicles glide past on the left, their headlights piercing the dusk atmosphere. The scene then shifts as the concrete building recedes to the right, moving the camera through alternating patterns of light and shadow cast by the overhead structure. Finally, the perspective opens up to reveal a large, luminous neon billboard emerging in the distance as traffic continues to flow through the city.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling, neon-lit intersection into the shadowed industrial underbelly of an elevated highway. It begins as the character steps from the sidewalk onto a crosswalk, where the view opens up to reveal palm trees and buildings adorned with bright red neon signage. As the character navigates through pedestrian traffic and a passing yellow taxi, the massive structure of the highway looms closer overhead. The scene then shifts as the character reaches the far side of the intersection, moving beneath the highway where the open sky is replaced by industrial support columns and scattered debris. Finally, the environment narrows into a quieter urban corridor with parked vehicles and palm trees lining the path as the character follows another pedestrian forward.
